subcodes.first_line: O attracted leaf! Though it be the hour of eventide and the darkness of night hath encompassed the horizons, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه هر چند وقت عشاء است و ظلام شام آفاق را احاطه نموده ولی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation, @equality of men and women, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
